peter.name: Peter Griffin
peter.note: Male, middle-aged, boisterous. Works well with any male US voice.

stewie.name: Stewie Griffin
stewie.note: Infant, posh British. Needs a male British source and a strong pitch-up.

brian.name: Brian Griffin
brian.note: Male, dry, adult. Most generic male voices convert cleanly.

quagmire.name: Glenn Quagmire
quagmire.note: Male, smooth, rapid. Lower index_rate if pronunciation suffers.

consuela.name: Consuela
consuela.note: Female, Spanish-accented English. Use a Spanish source voice.
